name: agent-manager
description: Standalone subagent runner for AWB — drives Claude / DeepSeek / Codex / Antigravity CLIs without a host editor

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test test/session-dedup.test.mjs && node --test test/moving-cue-resume.test.mjs && node --test test/antigravity-adapter.test.mjs && node --test test/chat-attachment-prep.test.mjs && node --test test/silent-exit-fallback.test.mjs && node --test test/restart-reap-resume.test.mjs && node --test test/host-mcp-server.test.mjs && node --test test/circuit-breaker.test.mjs
